# nerdctl_container_start (Action)

Starts a stopped container with `nerdctl start`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "nerdctl_container_start" "app" {
  config {
    container = "app"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container` (String) Container name or ID.
